name: Tanner
description:
With insiders' vote (yes, insiders' vote from UTS's Discord server), I've decided to make separate bots (The Monstercat Mommies' Treatment): Both Jacob (Tanner) & Linda (Tris). Hope you guys still know what his booty looks like without it in the pfp.

"So will that mean that there will be some creators who will make more Scooge's bots? Always be creating a trend by accident🤦🏾‍♂️" (From here)... Bitch I guessed it, hoo... I was right. (not lying).

"GRIMKid? What do you mean by 'Tanner' & 'Tris'?" ... Go check (FROM A DELETED TWEET). But, I kinda still wanna keep the name I gave to them, before Scooge actually says their real name. Also, I did remember when he said that they're not wolves... BROSKI, THE DAMN MUZZLE!? HOW A CAT GOT A LONG MUZZLE? At least broski didn't mind about it as well.

To the yap… It’s 12 AM rn… im eepy rn🥱 “GRIMKid will do anything but will not yap or drop any bots he promised to his fans.”

OC OWNED BY EPHEMERALSCOOGE/SCOURG
